## Type of Contribution

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] New perspective or framework
- [ ] Correction or improvement (factual, clarity, references)
- [ ] Additional depth (case study, worked example, supporting evidence)
- [ ] Counter-argument to existing content
- [ ] New topic
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## Summary

<!-- What did you change, and why? Be concise but specific. -->

---

## Related Issue

<!-- If you raised an issue first (recommended), link it here. -->
<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My contribution is relevant to enterprise security
- [ ] My writing targets security leaders, architects, and practitioners
- [ ] I have used clear, direct language and acknowledged trade-offs where relevant
- [ ] My contribution does not promote a specific product, vendor, or service
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
